# Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant 2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/). Report violations by [opening a private security advisory](https://github.com/Eamon3949/sds-saodiseng/security/advisories/new) or contacting the maintainer via GitHub. Maintainers will respond within 7 days.
